# AGENTS.md

Cross-tool agent instructions (read by Copilot coding agent, Claude, and others). This file is intentionally short — it points at the canonical sources rather than duplicating them.

- **Full project reference**: see [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md) — layout, build/test commands, conventions.
- **Always-on coding standards**: `.claude/rules/code-quality.md`, `.claude/rules/testing.md`.
- **Path-specific rules**: other files in `.claude/rules/` (and the mirrored `.github/instructions/*.instructions.md`).
- **Plans / working docs**: `.claude/plans/` (gitignored, project-local).

Follow the same conventions whichever tool you are.
